mapper.select: SELECT tree.TREE_CD AS id , COALESCE(tree.UPPER_TREE_CD, '#') AS parent , tree.TREE_NM AS text , CAST(tree.TREE_DEPTH AS VARCHAR) AS "level" , CASE WHEN tree.UPPER_TREE_CD IS NULL THEN 'root' WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM DOCS_PRODUCT_TREE child WHERE child.UPPER_TREE_CD = tree.TREE_CD AND COALESCE(child.USE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y') THEN 'group' ELSE 'item' END AS "type" , tree.SORT_ORDER AS sort , COALESCE(tree.USE_YN, 'Y') AS useYn , CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM DOCS_PRODUCT_TREE child WHERE child.UPPER_TREE_CD = tree.TREE_CD AND COALESCE(child.USE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y') THEN '' ELSE 'objectNoPrefix' END AS filterType , tree.TREE_NM AS filterValue , CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM DOCS_PRODUCT_TREE child WHERE child.UPPER_TREE_CD = tree.TREE_CD AND COALESCE(child.USE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y') THEN '' ELSE tree.TREE_NM END AS objectNoPrefix , '' AS distributeTypeCd FROM DOCS_PRODUCT_TREE tree WHERE COALESCE(tree.USE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y' ORDER BY tree.TREE_PATH, tree.SORT_ORDER, tree.TREE_NM
SELECT tree_cd AS comboVal , tree_nm AS comboLabel FROM docs_product_tree WHERE COALESCE(use_yn, 'Y') = 'Y' AND tree_depth = 1 ORDER BY sort_order, tree_nm

SELECT COALESCE( MAX( CASE WHEN split_part(DOCUMENT_NO, '-', 4) ~ '^[0-9]+$' THEN CAST(split_part(DOCUMENT_NO, '-', 4) AS INTEGER) ELSE NULL END ), 0 ) + 1 FROM DOCS_PRODUCT_DOCUMENT WHERE DOCUMENT_NO LIKE 'K8-MRB-L%-%' AND COALESCE(DELETED_YN, 'N') = 'N' AND split_part(DOCUMENT_NO, '-', 3) ~ '^L[0-9]+$' AND CAST(SUBSTRING(split_part(DOCUMENT_NO, '-', 3) FROM 2) AS INTEGER) = CAST(#{levelNo} AS INTEGER)

SELECT COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_COUNT FROM ( SELECT A1.*, (SELECT USER_NM FROM DOCS_USER tmp WHERE tmp.USER_ID = A1.insertUid) AS insertUserNm, (SELECT USER_NM FROM DOCS_USER tmp WHERE tmp.USER_ID = A1.updateUid) AS updateUserNm FROM (
SELECT * FROM (
SELECT info.BUSINESS_AREA_CD AS businessAreaCd, info.BUSINESS_TYPE_CD AS businessTypeCd, info.DOCUMENT_NO AS objectNo, info.OBJECT_ID AS objectId, info.REV_NO AS revNo, info.DOCUMENT_NM AS objectNm, 'DOC' AS objectType, info.DOC_CLASS_CD2 AS objectClassCd2, FN_GET_CD_NM('objectClassCd2', info.DOC_CLASS_CD2, #{sessionLang}) AS objectClassNm2, info.INSERT_UID AS insertUid, info.INTERFACE_DT AS insertDt, info.UPDATE_UID AS updateUid, info.UPDATE_DT AS updateDt, info.TOTAL_PAGE_CNT AS totalPageCnt, COALESCE(info.APPLY_PRODUCT_NO, '') AS productNm, info.APPLY_PRODUCT_NO AS productNo, info.CALL_ID AS callId, info.APPLY_HOGI_NO AS applyHogiNo, info.SECURITY_TYPE_CD AS securityTypeCd, FN_GET_CD_NM('securityTypeCd', info.SECURITY_TYPE_CD, #{sessionLang}) AS securityTypeNm, DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY DOCUMENT_NO ORDER BY CUSTOMER_REVISION DESC) AS rnk, fileInfo.FILE_NO AS fileNo, fileInfo.ORG_FILE_NM AS fileViewNm, fileInfo.FILE_NM AS fileNm, fileInfo.FILE_SIZE AS fileSize, fileInfo.ORG_FILE_NM AS orgFileNm, fileInfo.FILE_PATH_NM AS filePath, info.DISTRIBUTION_POINT AS distributionPoint, info.drawing_no AS drawingNo, info.drawing_nm AS drawingNm, info.change_action_no AS changeActionNo, '창원' AS factoryRegion, info.customer_revision AS customerRevision, info.file_order AS fileOrder, info.document_page AS documentPage, info.document_total_page AS documentTotalPage, info.drawing_usage AS drawingUsage, info.document_validation_expiredate AS documentValidationExpireDate, info.request_ed_date AS requestedDate, info.document_approval_date AS documentApprovalDate, info.standardization_approval_date AS standardizationApprovalDate, info.technology_change_approval_date AS technologyChangeApprovalDate, info.model_code AS modelCode, info.check_3dfile AS check3DFile, info.input_date AS inputDate, info.revision AS revision, info.connection_id AS connectionId, '' AS checkSum, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY COALESCE(info.DRAWING_NO, info.DOCUMENT_NO, info.OBJECT_ID) ORDER BY info.CREATE_DATE DESC ) AS rn FROM DOCS_PRODUCT_DOCUMENT_FILE fileInfo JOIN DOCS_PRODUCT_DOCUMENT info ON fileInfo.OBJECT_ID = info.OBJECT_ID WHERE DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY DOCUMENT_NO ORDER BY CUSTOMER_REVISION DESC) = 1
SELECT info.BUSINESS_AREA_CD AS businessAreaCd, info.BUSINESS_TYPE_CD AS businessTypeCd, info.DOCUMENT_NO AS objectNo, info.OBJECT_ID AS objectId, info.REV_NO AS revNo, info.DOCUMENT_NM AS objectNm, 'DOC' AS objectType, info.DOC_CLASS_CD2 AS objectClassCd2, FN_GET_CD_NM('objectClassCd2', info.DOC_CLASS_CD2, #{sessionLang}) AS objectClassNm2, info.INSERT_UID AS insertUid, info.INTERFACE_DT AS insertDt, info.UPDATE_UID AS updateUid, info.UPDATE_DT AS updateDt, info.TOTAL_PAGE_CNT AS totalPageCnt, COALESCE(info.APPLY_PRODUCT_NO, '') AS productNm, info.APPLY_PRODUCT_NO AS productNo, info.CALL_ID AS callId, info.APPLY_HOGI_NO AS applyHogiNo, info.SECURITY_TYPE_CD AS securityTypeCd, FN_GET_CD_NM('securityTypeCd', info.SECURITY_TYPE_CD, #{sessionLang}) AS securityTypeNm, fileInfo.FILE_NO AS fileNo, fileInfo.ORG_FILE_NM AS fileViewNm, fileInfo.FILE_NM AS fileNm, fileInfo.FILE_SIZE AS fileSize, fileInfo.ORG_FILE_NM AS orgFileNm, fileInfo.FILE_PATH_NM AS filePath, info.DISTRIBUTION_POINT AS distributionPoint, info.drawing_no AS drawingNo, info.drawing_nm AS drawingNm, info.change_action_no AS changeActionNo, '창원' AS factoryRegion, info.customer_revision AS customerRevision, info.file_order AS fileOrder, info.document_page AS documentPage, info.document_total_page AS documentTotalPage, info.drawing_usage AS drawingUsage, info.document_validation_expiredate AS documentValidationExpireDate, info.request_ed_date AS requestedDate, info.document_approval_date AS documentApprovalDate, info.standardization_approval_date AS standardizationApprovalDate, info.technology_change_approval_date AS technologyChangeApprovalDate, info.model_code AS modelCode, info.check_3dfile AS check3DFile, info.input_date AS inputDate, info.revision AS revision, info.connection_id AS connectionId, '' AS checkSum, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY info.DRAWING_NO ORDER BY info.CREATE_DATE DESC ) AS rn FROM DOCS_PRODUCT_DOCUMENT_FILE fileInfo JOIN DOCS_PRODUCT_DOCUMENT info ON fileInfo.OBJECT_ID = info.OBJECT_ID
WHERE 1=1 AND info.DELETED_YN = 'N'
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM DOCS_PRODUCT_TREE node JOIN DOCS_PRODUCT_TREE selectedNode ON selectedNode.TREE_CD = #{treeCd} WHERE node.TREE_CD = info.TREE_CD AND node.TREE_PATH LIKE selectedNode.TREE_PATH || '%' )
AND ( COALESCE(info.DISTRIBUTION_POINT, '') = '' OR POSITION(',' || #{deptNm} || ',' IN ',' || info.DISTRIBUTION_POINT || ',') > 0 )
AND DOCUMENT_NO LIKE '%' || UPPER(TRIM(#{objectNo})) || '%'
AND info.DRAWING_NO = UPPER(TRIM(#{drawingNo}))
AND info.DRAWING_NO LIKE '%' || UPPER(TRIM(#{drawingNo})) || '%'
AND info.DOCUMENT_NM LIKE '%' || #{objectNm} || '%'
AND INSERT_UID = #{insertUid}
AND INSERT_DEPT_NM LIKE #{insertDeptNm}
AND DOC_CLASS_CD2 LIKE #{objectClassCd2}
AND info.INTERFACE_DT BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{interfaceStartDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(#{interfaceEndDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + INTERVAL '1 DAY'
AND (
(DOCUMENT_NO LIKE '%' || UPPER(TRIM(#{productionInfo.objectNo})) || '%')
)
AND (
(DOCUMENT_NO = UPPER(TRIM(#{productionInfo.objectNo})))
)
WHERE rnk = 1
) A1 ) A1 ) B1
mapper.insert:
SELECT (NOW(),'YYYYMMDD') || '-' || #{objectTypeCode} || LPAD(COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTR(REQUEST_NO, 11))::INT, 0) + 1, 4, '0') AS REQUEST_NO FROM DOCS_REQUEST WHERE SUBSTR(REQUEST_NO, 1, 10) = TO_CHAR(NOW(),'YYYYMMDD') || '-' || #{objectTypeCode}
INSERT INTO DOCS_REQUEST (REQUEST_NO, REQUEST_TYPE, REQUEST_PURPOSE, APPROVAL_LINE_ID, CURRENT_PROCESS_SEQ_NO, DEPLOY_COMPANY_CD, USE_START_YMD, USE_END_YMD, WATERMARK_YN, INSERT_USER_CD, INSERT_DT, UPDATE_USER_CD, UPDATE_DT, STATUS_CD, OBJECT_TYPE, BUSINESS_AREA_CD, WATERMARK_DEPLOY_DT_YN) VALUES (#{requestNo}, #{requestType}, #{requestPurpose}, #{approvalLineId}, '2', #{sessionUser.companyCd}, #{deployDate}, #{validDate}, #{watermarkYn}, #{sessionUser.userCd}, NOW(), #{sessionUser.userCd}, NOW(), 'REQUEST', #{objectType}, #{businessAreaCd}, #{watermarkDeployDtYn})

INSERT INTO DOCS_REQUEST_MAPPING (REQUEST_NO, USE_YN, OBJECT_ID, OBJECT_NO, OBJECT_NM, BUSINESS_AREA_CD, BUSINESS_TYPE_CD, SW_VERSION_NO, DOC_VERSION_NO, REV_NO, CURRENT_PAGE_NO, TOTAL_PAGE_NO, ECN_NO, STD_GAPP_DT, CHANGE_GAPP_DT, PROTECT_YN, PRODUCT_CD, DISTRIBUTE_TYPE_CD, FILE_NM, APPLY_HOGI_NO, OBJECT_CLASS_NM2, OBJECT_CLASS_CD2) VALUES
(#{requestNo}, 'Y', #{mappingParam.objectId}, #{mappingParam.objectNo}, #{mappingParam.objectNm}, #{mappingParam.businessAreaCd}, #{mappingParam.businessTypeCd}, #{mappingParam.swVersionNo}, #{mappingParam.docVersionNo}, #{mappingParam.revNo}, #{mappingParam.currentPageNo}, #{mappingParam.totalPageNo}, #{mappingParam.ecnNo}, #{mappingParam.stdGappDt}, #{mappingParam.changeGappDt}, #{mappingParam.protectYn}, #{mappingParam.productCd}, #{mappingParam.distributeTypeCd}, #{mappingParam.fileNm}, #{mappingParam.applyHogiNo}, #{mappingParam.objectClassNm2}, #{mappingParam.objectClassCd2})

INSERT INTO DOCS_REQUEST_DEPLOY (REQUEST_NO, DEPLOY_USER_CD, DEPLOY_USER_EMAIL) VALUES
(#{requestNo}, #{acceptance.userCd}, (SELECT EMAIL FROM DOCS_USER WHERE USER_CD = #{acceptance.userCd}))

INSERT INTO DOCS_DEPLOY_INFO (REQUEST_NO, OBJECT_ID, DEPLOY_USER_CD, DEPLOY_COUNT, COPY, DESTROY_COUNT, DESTROY_STATUS_CD) VALUES
(#{requestNo}, #{deployInfo.objectId}, #{deployInfo.deployUserCd}, #{deployInfo.deployCount}, #{deployInfo.copy}, #{deployInfo.destroyCount}, #{deployInfo.destroyStatusCd})
mapper.select:
SELECT OBJECT_ID AS objectId, BUSINESS_AREA_CD AS businessAreaCd, BUSINESS_TYPE_CD AS businessTypeCd, REV_NO AS revNo, APPLY_HOGI_NO AS applyHogiNo, ECN_NO AS ecnNo,
DOCUMENT_NO AS objectNo, DOCUMENT_NM AS objectNm, DOC_CLASS_NM2 AS objectClassNm2, DOC_CLASS_CD2 AS objectClassCd2, TOTAL_PAGE_CNT AS totalPageNo
SW_VERSION_NO AS swVersionNo, SW_NO AS objectNo, SW_NM AS objectNm, SW_CLASS_NM2 AS objectClassNm2, SW_CLASS_CD2 AS objectClassCd2, PRODUCT_CD AS productCd
FROM
DOCS_PRODUCT_DOCUMENT
DOCS_PRODUCT_SW
WHERE OBJECT_ID IN
#{requestInfo.objectId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(CAST(CN_SERIAL AS INTEGER)), 0) + 1 AS cnSerial FROM DOCS_PRODUCT_DOCUMENT
INSERT INTO DOCS_PRODUCT_DOCUMENT (OBJECT_ID, CN_SERIAL, INSERT_DT, mrbDate, BUSINESS_AREA_CD, BUSINESS_TYPE_CD, TREE_CD, DOCUMENT_NO, DRAWING_NO, REV_NO, DOCUMENT_NM, DRAWING_NM, DISTRIBUTE_TYPE_CD, INTERFACE_DT, TOTAL_PAGE_CNT, INSERT_UID, REGISTER_USER, APPROVER, REVIEWERUSER, APPROVED_USERS, STATUS) VALUES (#{objectId}, CAST(#{cnSerial} AS INTEGER), NOW(), CAST(NULLIF(#{ccbIssueDt}, '') AS DATE), #{sessionUser.businessAreaCd}, #{businessTypeCd}, #{treeCd}, #{productionNo}, #{productionNo}, #{revNo}, #{fileNm}, #{fileNm}, #{distributeTypeCd}, NOW(), CAST(#{pdm} AS INTEGER), #{sessionUser.userId}, COALESCE(NULLIF(#{sessionUser.userNm}, ''), #{sessionUser.username}), #{approver}, #{reviewerUser}, '', #{statusCd})

SELECT COALESCE(MAX(CAST(CN_SERIAL AS INTEGER)), 0) AS cnSerial FROM DOCS_PRODUCT_DOCUMENT
INSERT INTO DOCS_PRODUCT_DOCUMENT_FILE (OBJECT_ID, CN_SERIAL, INTERFACE_DT, FILE_SIZE, ORG_FILE_NM, FILE_NO, DISTRIBUTE_TYPE_CD, FILE_PATH_NM, REGISTER_USER, PROCESSING_STATUS, PROCESSING_ERROR, PROCESSED_AT) VALUES (#{objectId}, CAST(#{cnSerial} AS INTEGER), NOW(), #{fileSize}, #{orgFileNm}, CAST(#{fileNo} AS INTEGER), #{distributeTypeCd}, #{filePath}, COALESCE(NULLIF(#{sessionUser.userNm}, ''), #{sessionUser.username}), 'PROCESSING', NULL, NULL)

SELECT COALESCE(MAX(FILE_NO), 0) + 1 FROM DOCS_PRODUCTION_SUB_FILE WHERE PARENT_OBJECT_ID = #{parentObjectId}
INSERT INTO DOCS_PRODUCTION_SUB_FILE (OBJECT_ID, PARENT_OBJECT_ID, FILE_NO, ORG_FILE_NM, FILE_PATH_NM, FILE_SIZE, USE_YN, INSERT_UID, INSERT_DT, UPDATE_UID, UPDATE_DT) VALUES (#{objectId}, #{parentObjectId}, CAST(#{fileNo} AS INTEGER), #{orgFileNm}, #{filePath}, CAST(#{fileSize} AS BIGINT), COALESCE(NULLIF(#{useYn}, ''), 'Y'), COALESCE(NULLIF(#{sessionUser.userId}, ''), #{sessionUser.username}), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, NULL, NULL)
mapper.select: SELECT info.OBJECT_ID AS objectId, COALESCE(info.INSERT_UID, '') AS insertUid, COALESCE(insertUser.USER_NM, COALESCE(info.REGISTER_USER, '')) AS insertUserNm, COALESCE(info.APPROVER, '') AS approver, COALESCE(info.REVIEWERUSER, '') AS reviewerUser, COALESCE(info.APPROVED_USERS, '') AS approvedUsers, COALESCE(info.STATUS, '') AS status, COALESCE(info.REV_NO, '') AS revNo, COALESCE(info.DELETED_YN, 'N') AS deletedYn FROM DOCS_PRODUCT_DOCUMENT info LEFT JOIN DOCS_USER insertUser ON insertUser.USER_ID = info.INSERT_UID WHERE info.OBJECT_ID = #{objectId}
mapper.update: UPDATE DOCS_PRODUCT_DOCUMENT SET APPROVED_USERS = CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM regexp_split_to_table(COALESCE(APPROVED_USERS, ''), ',') AS au(token) WHERE split_part(TRIM(au.token), '|', 1) = split_part(#{approvedUser}, '|', 1) ) THEN COALESCE(APPROVED_USERS, '') WHEN COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(APPROVED_USERS), ''), '') = '' THEN #{approvedUser} ELSE COALESCE(APPROVED_USERS, '') || ',' || #{approvedUser} END, STATUS = CASE WHEN #{isFinal} = 'Y' THEN '승인완료' ELSE '승인진행중' END WHERE OBJECT_ID = #{objectId} AND COALESCE(DELETED_YN, 'N') = 'N'
mapper.select: SELECT doc.OBJECT_ID AS "objectId", doc.DOCUMENT_NO AS "productionNo", fileInfo.FILE_NO AS "fileNo", fileInfo.ORG_FILE_NM AS "orgFileNm", fileInfo.FILE_SIZE AS "fileSize", COALESCE(fileInfo.PROCESSING_STATUS, '') AS "processingStatus", fileInfo.FILE_PATH_NM AS "filePath" FROM DOCS_PRODUCT_DOCUMENT doc JOIN DOCS_PRODUCT_DOCUMENT_FILE fileInfo ON fileInfo.OBJECT_ID = doc.OBJECT_ID WHERE doc.OBJECT_ID = #{objectId} AND COALESCE(doc.DELETED_YN, 'N') = 'N' AND CAST(fileInfo.FILE_NO AS INTEGER) = 1 LIMIT 1

SELECT fileInfo.OBJECT_ID AS "objectId", fileInfo.PARENT_OBJECT_ID AS "parentObjectId", fileInfo.FILE_NO AS "fileNo", fileInfo.ORG_FILE_NM AS "orgFileNm", fileInfo.FILE_SIZE AS "fileSize", fileInfo.FILE_PATH_NM AS "filePath" FROM DOCS_PRODUCTION_SUB_FILE fileInfo WHERE fileInfo.PARENT_OBJECT_ID = #{objectId} AND COALESCE(fileInfo.USE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y' ORDER BY CAST(fileInfo.FILE_NO AS INTEGER)
SELECT OBJECT_ID AS "objectId", APPROVER_ID AS "approverId", COALESCE(COMMENT_TXT, '') AS "comment" FROM DOCS_PRODUCTION_APPROVAL_COMMENT WHERE OBJECT_ID = #{objectId}
mapper.update: UPDATE DOCS_PRODUCT_DOCUMENT_FILE SET FILE_PATH_NM = #{filePath}, FILE_SIZE = #{fileSize}, PROCESSING_STATUS = 'DONE', PROCESSING_ERROR = NULL, PROCESSED_AT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE OBJECT_ID = #{objectId} AND CAST(FILE_NO AS INTEGER) = 1
UPDATE DOCS_PRODUCT_DOCUMENT_FILE SET PROCESSING_STATUS = 'FAIL', PROCESSING_ERROR = #{errorMessage}, PROCESSED_AT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE OBJECT_ID = #{objectId} AND CAST(FILE_NO AS INTEGER) = 1

INSERT INTO DOCS_PRODUCTION_APPROVAL_COMMENT ( OBJECT_ID, APPROVER_ID, COMMENT_TXT, UPDATE_DT ) VALUES ( #{objectId}, #{approverId}, #{comment}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ) ON CONFLICT (OBJECT_ID, APPROVER_ID) DO UPDATE SET COMMENT_TXT = EXCLUDED.COMMENT_TXT, UPDATE_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select:
SELECT u.USER_NM AS "userName", u.USER_ID AS "userId", COALESCE(p.POSITION_NM, '') AS "positionName" FROM DOCS_USER u LEFT JOIN DOCS_POSITION p ON p.POSITION_CD = u.POSITION_CD WHERE (u.USER_NM IN
#{name}
OR u.USER_ID IN
#{name} )
